---
title: "Canon Canonical Rules"
subtitle: "The normative rules governing UIAO canon document structure and validity"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Page in preparation
Full documentation is being drafted from the [UIAO Document Metadata Contract](../meta/uiao-document-metadata-contract.qmd) and [ADR Metadata Contract](../meta/adr-metadata-contract.qmd).
:::
